summary: Plan repair of canonical PR #93549 only. Current main still keeps the pre-execution watchdog armed until an execution-stage phase or first model call, while #93549 is the narrow watchdog-side candidate with real behavior proof and maintainer-modifiable branch. No GitHub mutations are planned because comments, closes, labels, merge, force-push, and bypass actions are blocked for this job.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93549 so the cron isolated-agent watchdog treats any valid execution phase signal as runner progress for clearing the pre-execution watchdog, while preserving the existing fallback re-arm behavior when execution returns to setup-like phases.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): clear watchdog on valid phase progress
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #93549 so valid cron agent phase updates clear the pre-execution watchdog once the runner is making progress.
- Preserve the fallback re-arm path where before_agent_reply can move back to setup-like phases and must still time out if it stalls.
- Keep the fix scoped to src/cron/service/agent-watchdog.ts and the focused timer regression coverage.

Fixes #93530.

Credit: based on contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93549 by @lzyyzznl.

## Verification
- pnpm check:changed
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
- /review
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93549 by @lzyyzznl.
Mention #93530 as the user-visible bug report fixed by the repaired PR.
Do not claim credit from superseded overlapping PRs #93535 or #93561 unless their code or wording is reused.
